ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chromosome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precision_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision value */,
  "precision_text" TEXT /* Precision text (e.g., 0.90 (146 / 162)) */,
  "precision_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for precision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precision_metrics_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precision_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensitivity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity value */,
  "sensitivity_text" TEXT /* Sensitivity text (e.g., 0.71 (146 / 207)) */,
  "sensitivity_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for sensitivity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensitivity_metrics_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensitivity_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file (e.g., CSV, VCF) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "job_status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the job started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the job ended */,
  "job_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_jobs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., logistic regression, decision tree) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., bar chart, scatter plot) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collaboration_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
